name: Bhapi Safety
subtitle: Family AI Monitoring
description:
Bhapi Safety gives parents peace of mind in the age of AI. Your children are using ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Claude, Grok, Character.AI, and dozens of other AI platforms every day — Bhapi Safety keeps you informed without invading their privacy.

SET UP IN MINUTES
Connect your family, install the Bhapi browser extension on your children's devices, and start seeing a clear picture of their AI activity. No technical knowledge required.

MONITOR 10+ AI PLATFORMS
Bhapi Safety covers the AI tools your kids actually use: ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Claude, Grok, Character.AI, Perplexity, Pi, Poe, Bing Chat, and more. All activity is surfaced in one clean dashboard.

FAMILY SAFETY SCORE
Every child has a real-time Safety Score from 0 to 100. The score reflects AI conversation patterns, content categories, time spent, and any flagged interactions — giving you a single, honest view of how things are going.

REAL-TIME ALERTS THAT MATTER
Bhapi Safety only alerts you when something actually needs attention. Get notified about concerning conversations, unusual usage spikes, or content that falls outside your family's guidelines — with suggested next steps so you always know what to do.

SCREEN TIME MANAGEMENT
Set daily AI usage limits by platform, by device, or across the board. Schedule wind-down times and bedtime lockouts. Children receive gentle warnings before limits are reached, so there are no surprises.

LOCATION & GEOFENCING
See where your children are throughout the day. Create safe zones — home, school, a friend's house — and get notified when they arrive or leave.

CONTENT MODERATION
For children under 13, all content is reviewed before it goes anywhere — including social posts, AI-assisted messages, and creative projects. You review and approve, keeping your child safe without hovering.

SCHOOL & TEACHER INTEGRATION
Bhapi Safety connects with your child's school. Teachers and administrators can share safety alerts, and school-wide AI usage policies sync automatically to your family settings.

COPPA 2026 COMPLIANT
Bhapi Safety meets and exceeds the updated Children's Online Privacy Protection Act standards. Your children's data is never sold, never used for advertising, and never shared without your explicit consent.

WORKS WITH BHAPI SOCIAL
Bhapi Safety is the parent-side companion to Bhapi Social — the safe, moderated social network built for kids. Everything your child does in Bhapi Social is visible to you here.

PRIVACY BY DESIGN
We believe monitoring should build trust, not undermine it. Bhapi Safety shows children what parents can see, encouraging open conversations about digital safety. Transparency is built in.

PLANS & PRICING
• Family Plan: Up to 5 children, $9.99/month or $89.99/year
• School Plan: Per-seat pricing for classrooms and institutions
• 14-day free trial — no credit card required

Requires the free Bhapi browser extension on children's devices (Chrome, Firefox, and Safari supported).
keywords: parental controls,AI safety,screen time,family monitoring,kids online safety,ChatGPT monitor,child safety,digital wellbeing
whats_new: Version 3.0 brings a completely redesigned dashboard with faster safety score updates, improved real-time alerts, expanded AI platform coverage including Grok and Perplexity, and new school integration features. Location tracking now supports multiple geofences per child.
promotional_text: Peace of mind for the AI age. Monitor your children's AI activity across 10+ platforms — real-time alerts, safety scores, screen time controls.
